use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node, TreeCursor};

const FIELD_NAME: u16 = 0;
const FIELD_VALUE: u16 = 1;
const FIELD_BODY: u16 = 2;
const FIELD_PARAMS: u16 = 3;
const FIELD_RETURN_TYPE: u16 = 4;

fn walk_with_ids(node: Node, source: &str, language: tree_sitter::Language) {
    let field_id_name = language.field_id_for_name("name").unwrap();
    let field_id_value = language.field_id_for_name("value").unwrap();

    let mut cursor = node.walk();
    for child in node.children(&mut cursor) {
        if child.field_id() == Some(field_id_name) {
            let text = &source[child.start_byte()..child.end_byte()];
            println!("name: {}", text);
        }
        walk_with_ids(child, source, language.clone());
    }
}

fn extract_with_cursor(node: Node, source: &str) {
    let mut cursor = node.walk();
    for child in node.named_children(&mut cursor) {
        let kind = child.kind();
        match kind {
            "function_item" => {
                let name = child.child_by_field_name("name");
                if let Some(name) = name {
                    let text = &source[name.start_byte()..name.end_byte()];
                    println!("fn: {}", text);
                }
            }
            _ => {}
        }
    }
}
